properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v5 v7 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As long as stars shine down from heaven And the rivers run into the sea Til the end of time forever You're the only love I'll need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In my life you're all that matters In my eyes the only truth I see When my hopes and dreams have shattered You're the one that's there for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I found you I was blessed And I will never leave you, I need you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Imagine me without you I'd be lost and so confused I wouldn't last a day, I'd be afraid Without you there to see me through

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Imagine me without you Lord, you know it's just impossible Because of you, it's all brand new My life is now worthwhile I can't imagine me without you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When you caught me I was falling You're love lifted me back on my feet It was like you heard my calling And you rush to set me free

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When I found you I was blessed And I will never leave you, I need you oh
